languages.original_text: "A paradox. The auspex scans show nothing. The organic diagnostors are silent. Nuncius! What we have here is an unfathomable site! Make a note of the need to return here... at a later time."

languages.text: "Парадокс. Ауспекс-сканирование не показывает ничего. Диагносторы органики безмолвны. Нунциус! Перед нами непостижимый объект! Зафиксируй необходимость сюда вернуться... впоследствии".
"A paradox. The auspex scans show nothing. The organic diagnostors are silent. Nuncius! What we have here is an unfathomable site! Make a note of the need to return here... at a later time."
languages.original_text: "Парадокс. Ауспекс-сканирование не показывает ничего. Диагносторы органики безмолвны. Нунциус! Перед нами непостижимый объект! Зафиксируй необходимость сюда вернуться... впоследствии".

"A paradox. The auspex scans show nothing. The organic diagnostors are silent. Nuncius! What we have here is an unfathomable site! Make a note of the need to return here... at a later time."

languages.text: «Una paradoja. Los escáneres del aúspex no muestran nada. Los diagnostores orgánicos guardan silencio. ¡Nuncius! ¡Lo que tenemos aquí es algo insondable! Tome nota sobre la necesidad de volver aquí... en otro momento».
languages.original_text: "A paradox. The auspex scans show nothing. The organic diagnostors are silent. Nuncius! What we have here is an unfathomable site! Make a note of the need to return here... at a later time."

traits.locale_text: «Una paradoja. Los escáneres del aúspex no muestran nada. Los diagnostores orgánicos guardan silencio. ¡Nuncius! ¡Lo que tenemos aquí es algo insondable! Tome nota sobre la necesidad de volver aquí... en otro momento».

languages.text: 「逆説です。オースペクスの走査は何も示さない。有機の診断器も沈黙している。ヌンキウス！ ここにあるのは、底知れぬ場所です！ ここへ立ち返る必要がある旨を書き留めておいてください……後日、改めて」
languages.original_text: "A paradox. The auspex scans show nothing. The organic diagnostors are silent. Nuncius! What we have here is an unfathomable site! Make a note of the need to return here... at a later time."

traits.locale_text: 「逆説です。オースペクスの走査は何も示さない。有機の診断器も沈黙している。ヌンキウス！ ここにあるのは、底知れぬ場所です！ ここへ立ち返る必要がある旨を書き留めておいてください……後日、改めて」

languages.text: “一个悖论。俄歇矩阵扫描显示一切正常，有机体诊断仪也保持缄默。努恩修斯！我们遇到了一个无法理解的地点！把这里标记下来……我们日后再访。”
languages.original_text: "A paradox. The auspex scans show nothing. The organic diagnostors are silent. Nuncius! What we have here is an unfathomable site! Make a note of the need to return here... at a later time."

traits.locale_text: “一个悖论。俄歇矩阵扫描显示一切正常，有机体诊断仪也保持缄默。努恩修斯！我们遇到了一个无法理解的地点！把这里标记下来……我们日后再访。”

languages.text: "Ein Paradox. Die Scans der Auspizien zeigen nichts an. Die organischen Diagnostoren schweigen. Nuncius! Wir haben es hier mit einem unfassbaren Ort zu tun. Notiert Euch, dass wir hierher zurückkehren ... irgendwann."
languages.original_text: "A paradox. The auspex scans show nothing. The organic diagnostors are silent. Nuncius! What we have here is an unfathomable site! Make a note of the need to return here... at a later time."

traits.locale_text: "Ein Paradox. Die Scans der Auspizien zeigen nichts an. Die organischen Diagnostoren schweigen. Nuncius! Wir haben es hier mit einem unfassbaren Ort zu tun. Notiert Euch, dass wir hierher zurückkehren ... irgendwann."

languages.text: « Comme c'est étrange... Les analyses des auspex ne révèlent rien. Les relevés organiques sont muets. Nuncius ! Nous sommes face à une énigme ! Il faudra que nous revenions, prends-en note. »
languages.original_text: "A paradox. The auspex scans show nothing. The organic diagnostors are silent. Nuncius! What we have here is an unfathomable site! Make a note of the need to return here... at a later time."

traits.locale_text: « Comme c'est étrange... Les analyses des auspex ne révèlent rien. Les relevés organiques sont muets. Nuncius ! Nous sommes face à une énigme ! Il faudra que nous revenions, prends-en note. »

languages.text: "Bir paradoks. Uzgören taramaları hiçbir şey göstermiyor. Organik teşhis cihazları sessiz. Nuncius! Burada karşı karşıya olduğumuz şey akıl almaz bir alan! İleride bir zamanda... Buraya dönme gerekliliğini not al."
languages.original_text: "A paradox. The auspex scans show nothing. The organic diagnostors are silent. Nuncius! What we have here is an unfathomable site! Make a note of the need to return here... at a later time."
